name: opencode-container
description: Run opencode in a Podman container with per-project isolation

commands.name: projects
commands.description: List all projects with isolated session data

main_options.name: --build
main_options.description: Force rebuild the container image before running

main_options.name: --feature-file
main_options.description: Merge .features from a JSON file into the generated devcontainer.json. Later files win on key collision.

main_options.name: --env-file
main_options.description: Pass an environment file to the container. Auto-detects .env in project root.

main_options.name: --web
main_options.description: Run in web UI mode instead of TUI

main_options.name: --port
main_options.description: Port to listen on (web mode only)

main_options.name: --no-open
main_options.description: Do not auto-open the browser (web mode only)

main_options.name: --no-git-root
main_options.description: Mount the current working directory instead of auto-detecting the git repository root

main_options.name: --no-git-init
main_options.description: Do not auto-initialise an empty git repo in non-git directories
